name: databatch
description: Exercises the MessageType_DataBatch path (per-element re-serialization in production).
notes: Currently no test/benchmark validates the module's DataBatch path (re-serializes each DataValue).
Flags --use-databatch and --batch-size are read from load.{use_databatch,batch_size}.
The module receives Message{DataBatch{DataValue[]}} and re-serializes them one by one (see inventorySyncFacade.hpp line 201).
